name: universal-agent-skills
description: Portable coding-agent skills for consistent implementation and verification workflows.

interface.longDescription: Share a canonical set of Agent Skills across Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, GitHub Copilot, and compatible tools.
defaultPrompt: Use $simplify-code to simplify code without changing behavior.
Use $surgical-implementation to keep the change minimal and goal-driven.
Use $no-ai-traces for commit messages, pull requests, and delivered docs.
Use $secret-hygiene whenever work could touch credentials.
Use $data-minimization when handling test data, logs, or personal records.
Use $supply-chain-pinning when adding or updating dependencies.
Use $license-compliance before copying or vendoring third-party code.
